violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained. Inside of reach in coolers and freezers noted not properly maintained. Reach in freezer noted in need of defrost.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen and walk in cooler noted in need of deep clean espacially under equipment. Walls and ceilings noted in need of celaning as well as vent covers.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Food equipment exteriors noted not clean. Fryer exterior and other equipment noted in need of cleaning.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in walk-in cooler. Raw chicken noted being not covered in walk in cooler.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Defrost freezer not properly maintained. Inside of reach in coolers and freezer noted not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning and repairs. Some ceiling tiles and vent covers in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
